description: Firmware bug in Kestrel-1 v1.4.2 leads to tuner driver crashes under low-SNR conditions, causing reboot loops.
Clock initialization failure on Weaver-Lite v2.0.1 causing timestamps to reset to 1970-01-01 epoch.
Secure OTP read storm on Ibis-4K v3.1.0. Error Flag=0 indicates benign retry; Flag=1 indicates hardware authentication failure.
Interrupted OTA update during power brownout on Kestrel-2 leaves devices in recovery boot loop.
Gradual memory leak over days on Weaver-Lite v1.9.9 ends in watchdog reboots due to application memory exhaustion.
